subcodes.first_line: O thou who stringest scattered pearls, in praise of the radiant flame of the Mount of divine effulgence, the Most Luminous Sun of the Dawning-Place of Manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظم لولو منثور در ستایش شعله نور مجلی طور آفتاب انور مشرق ظهور روحی
subcodes.subjects: @poems and quotation from poetry, @praise and encouragement
